content.text:
<analysis>
a. This is a PULL_REQUEST event with PR #212 "Re-review 139 BioReason-Pro RL predictions with interpro2go comparison" opened by cmungall on branch bioreason-re-review-2026-03-23 -> main.

b. This is a request for code review feedback. The direct prompt asks me to review the PR for code quality, bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. Key information:
- 139 BioReason review files were re-reviewed with updated format
- Added interpro2go comparison functionality 
- Updated project documentation and scoring distributions
- Updated the bioreason-predictions skill with new review instructions
- Regenerated HTML for 139 gene pages and project page
- Large changeset: +11147/-15076 across 100 files
- Findings show overall correctness 3.7/5, completeness 2.9/5 with systematic issues like localization errors and paralog confusion

d. Main tasks:
- Review the updated skill instructions in .claude/skills/bioreason-predictions/SKILL.md
- Examine sample BioReason review files to understand format changes
- Check project documentation updates
- Look for potential issues in code quality, bugs, performance, security
- Assess if changes follow repository guidelines from CLAUDE.md

e. Plan:
- Read CLAUDE.md for repo-specific guidelines
- Review the skill file changes
- Sample several BioReason review files to understand the new format
- Check project documentation updates
- Look for any potential issues or improvements
- Provide comprehensive review feedback via comment update

f. I should be able to complete this review using the Read and Grep tools. No special permissions needed for code review.
</analysis>

I'll review this pull request focusing on the requested areas. Let me start by creating a todo list and gathering context.

input.body: ### PR Review: BioReason-Pro RL predictions re-review with interpro2go comparison #### Review Checklist: - [ ] Read repository guidelines and setup from CLAUDE.md - [ ] Review skill instruction changes in `.claude/skills/bioreason-predictions/SKILL.md` - [ ] Examine sample BioReason review file format changes - [ ] Review project documentation updates - [ ] Assess code quality and best practices - [ ] Check for potential bugs or issues - [ ] Evaluate performance considerations - [ ] Review security concerns - [ ] Assess test coverage and validation - [ ] Provide final recommendations Analyzing this large-scale update to 139 BioReason prediction reviews... [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/23445223990)
